sourceOverview.notes: Studio-quality TTS for enterprise. Brand voices. Limited language coverage.

activeModelsSummary.tts: WellSaid API voice models [voice-based] — Docs emphasize speaker IDs/avatars more than a small global model list

audit.priceRangeSummary: Subscription/custom pricing; free trial account available.
audit.limitsSummary: Default API rate ~3 req/sec and ~1,000 chars/request.
audit.regionSummary: WellSaid cloud; public region detail limited.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English plus selected non-English languages/accents; coverage is materially narrower than ElevenLabs/Google/Azure.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Voice/avatar selection matters more than 'model ID'. Limited multilingual coverage may matter for a speech app with global users.

supplementalResearch.title: 50. WellSaid Labs (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 50. WellSaid Labs (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. Enterprise-focused. 120+ voice types, 53+ avatars. Primarily **English-focused**. Creative: $50/month/user. Business/Enterprise: custom. 7-day free trial only. SOC 2. API typically requires Business+ tier. ⚠️ Limited multilingual support.
